name: Kīlauea
eruptionHistory: One of the most active volcanoes on Earth. Erupted nearly continuously from 1983 to 2018. The 2018 eruption destroyed over 700 homes in Leilani Estates.
description: Kīlauea is one of the world's most active volcanoes and a shield volcano on the southeastern side of the Big Island of Hawaii. Its 2018 eruption was the most destructive in its modern history.
